49.reason: The array num is not initialized with -1 sentinel values, so this loop may run out of bounds or never terminate.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  The array num is not initialized with -1 sentinel values, so this loop may run out of bounds or never terminate.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  The array num is not initialized with -1 sentinel values, so this loop may run out of bounds or never terminate.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.25 , reason:  Uses uninitialized sentinel -1 in num array; undefined behavior.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Error: num array has no -1 sentinel, this loop may never terminate or cause out-of-bounds access.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  num array is globally initialized to 0, not -1. This condition will never be false for valid data, causing out-of-bounds access or infinite loop.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  'num' is a global array initialized to 0, not -1. This condition causes out-of-bounds access or infinite loop. Should use a valid bound or terminator.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [The condition 'num[m]!=-1' is incorrect because the array 'num' is never initialized to -1. This leads to undefined behavior when checking for termination. It should iterate until the end of valid numbers, not until a sentinel value that doesn't exist.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [The condition `num[m]!=-1` is incorrect because the array `num` is never initialized with -1 as a sentinel; this leads to undefined behavior when shifting elements]

33.reason: Stores '=' as an operator, should not be stored for computation.

37.reason: Adds an extra number (0) because atoi(aq) on empty string after '=' is processed, leading to incorrect number array.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.25 , reason:  Adds an extra number (0) because atoi(aq) on empty string after '=' is processed, leading to incorrect number array.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  Adds an extra 0 to the num array because aq was cleared when '=' was processed. This should be conditional or handled differently.

23.reason: 'gets' is deprecated and removed in C11 standard, causing compilation errors in modern environments. Use 'fgets' instead.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  gets() is deprecated and removed in C11 standard, causing compilation errors in modern compilers. Use fgets() instead.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  'gets' is deprecated and removed in C11 standard, causing compilation errors in modern environments. Use 'fgets' instead.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11; many modern compilers (like GCC) no longer support it by default, leading to a compilation error. Use 'fgets' instead.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Using `gets` is unsafe and deprecated; may cause compilation error with modern compilers due to removal from standard library]
